The flame for the Paris 2024 Summer Olympic Games will be lit in Greece's Ancient Olympia. The official lighting ceremony is to start at approximately 11:30 local time (4:30 p.m. Beijing Time) in Greece.

description: The flame for the Paris 2024 Summer Olympic Games will be lit in Greece's Ancient Olympia. The official lighting ceremony is to start at approximately 11:30 local time (4:30 p.m. Beijing Time) in Greece.
